matchingDescription: UK ISA, SIPP and GIA investing platform for retail investors, commission-free

variants.text: Freetrade is an award-winning investment platform used by 1.6m users. Invest commission-free in 7,600+ investments via ISA, SIPP, JISA or GIA.
Open a free Stocks and Shares ISA with Freetrade and start investing commission-free across thousands of UK and global investments.
Freetrade's SIPP lets you invest for retirement commission-free, alongside ISA and GIA accounts, in one award-winning app.
Start investing for a child's future with a Freetrade JISA — commission-free access to 7,600+ investments in one simple app.
With over 7,600 investments available commission-free, Freetrade gives retail investors broad choice across ISA, SIPP, JISA and GIA.
